title: Equivalence Check Issue
body:
I'm using Yosys equivalence checking to help validate rewritten verilog RTL.

My issue is that converting this if-else
```
if (ai | bi) begin
    yo <= 1'b1;
end else begin
    yo <= 1'b0;
end
```
to this
```
yo <= (ai | bi);
```
results in an unproven $equiv cell.

The two versions of the code containing the above snippets are in a2.v and b2.v.  The script for Yosys processing is in eqvc2.ys and the equivalence dot file is in equiv-prep.dot.

Is this a bug or am I missing something obvious?
